path: 05 Projects/2025-2026 Railway-X/TP2 - Use Case - TP 3.2.1 Traceability/Railway Fire Protection/SMT Railway Fire Protection/HARTING SDoCs Railway Fire Protection/SDoC Ha-VIS eCon 3011 DIN EN 45545-2.01.pdf
text: Supplier's Declaration of Conformity L1ATTIRG (in accordance with ISO/IEC 17050-1) Issuer's name: HARTING Electric Stiftung & Co. KG Issuer's address: Wilhem-Harting-Strake 1 32339 Espelkamp Germany Product Series Ha-VIS eCon 3011BT-AT1-SPE 24050011400 Ha-VIS eCon 3011GBT-AT1-SPE 24054011400 The products named above are in conformity with the requirements of: DIN EN 45545-2: 2023-12 Railway applications - Fire protection on railway vehicles - Part 2: Requirements for fire behaviour of materials and components The unclassified combustable mass is less than 50g including bare PCB according to DIN EN 50155 Edition: 2022-06, clause 11.4, the technical equipment on printed circuit boards isn't considered by DIN EN 45545-2 due to it's functional necessity. The Grouping Rules given in clause 4.3 of DIN EN 45545-2 have been applied. Thus up to 100 g of unclassified material may be used if Rules 1 to 3 are fulfi lled and the exposed area of each product is < 0,2 m7. Rule 1: If the total combustible mass of grouped products is < 100 g for interior products or < 400 9 for exterior products no requirements apply to the products of this group. Rule 2: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 1, but s < 500 g for interior grouped products or < 2000 g for exterior grouped products the products of this group have to be tested against R24 until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the mass as given in Rule 1. Then Rule 1 is applied. R24 requires test of oxygen index according to EN ISO 4589-2. Rule 3: If the combustible mass of the grouped products exceeds the limits stated in Rule 2, products of the group have to fulfill R22 for interior products and R23 for exterior products until the remaining mass of unclassified products is below the limits given in Rule 2. Then Rule 2 is applied. 'Norbert GemmékKe Managing Director Director Division Han® Espelkamp,Espelkamp, DHa2024-06-27 2024-06-27 Andre Beneke The given information reflects our current knowledge. It is based on statements and information of our suppliers and third parties. This declaration does not include guarantees of quality or durability. Topicality, completeness and accuracy of the content are subject to change without notice. The safety instructions are to be respected. The user is self-responsible for the evaluation of the information and the concrete measures derived from it. Besides that, HARTING is liable only for culpable, intentional or grossly negligent acting as long as no mandatory legal liability for damages of life, body, health or Product Liability Act exists.
